name: LSASS Memory Dump via ProcDump
description: Detects ProcDump targeting LSASS process memory
raw_query: process where process.name in ("procdump.exe","procdump64.exe") and process.command_line like~ "*lsass*"
translated_query: process where process.name in ("procdump.exe","procdump64.exe") and process.command_line like~ "*lsass*"
